name: walking-pad-distance-modifier
description: Chrome extension (Manifest V3) to load a Garmin-style walking activity JSON file, inspect key activity fields, modify distance values, and export an updated JSON file.

scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist dist/assets dist/lib && cp manifest.json popup.html popup.css popup.js dist/ && cp -R assets/. dist/assets/ && cp -R lib/. dist/lib/
